Days left to count: $30 - 1 = 29$ days.

These 29 days will fall in the next month, which is January.
So, the date will be the 29th day of January in the following year (1968).

The date 30 days from 12/30/1967 is 01/29/1968.

The answer is 01/29/1968.

Remaining days to go back: $14 - 12 = 2$ days.

We subtract the remaining 2 days from the last day of May (May has 31 days):

The date 14 days ago was 05/29/1975.
